{{Infobox character
| name = Parryl Cryce
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
| name = Parryl Cryce
| aliases = Parryl
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Green Knight, Lichborn girl, former Green Knight, Titan Knight
| abilities = force-blade
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

''See also: [[Parryl Cryce Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Parryl [[Cryce]], also known as the [[Green Knight]], is a [[Lichborn]] warrior and the niece of [[Doctor Janbell Cryce]]. Recognized as the youngest member of the [[Titan Knights]], she is characterized by her energetic personality and glowing emerald eyes. In combat, Parryl possesses significant power; she is capable of using standard handguns to destroy bunkers and utilizes a specific [[Combat Art]] to manage her weaponry. She has operated various vehicles, including a green starfighter and the [[Green Titan]]. During one engagement, she demonstrated extreme resilience by enduring injury from a [[force-blade]] without flinching. Following a period of intense combat and medical intervention, she was placed in an [[Aethertech]] stasis pod to recover from parasites.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl [[Cryce]] was a [[Lichborn]] girl who served as the [[Green Knight]], wielding a [[force-blade]] in combat. Her presence was eventually observed through an [[Aethertech capsule]] monitor, revealing her glowing green eyes. After transitioning into the role of a [[Titan Knight]], she piloted a green starfighter. Although she was held in a stasis chamber and expressed a desire to be with Raion, Parryl ultimately died after the narrator ensured her survival long enough to complete a mission.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl is the [[Green Knight]] and a [[Lichborn]] girl.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl is the [[Green Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl uses a [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Parryl Cryce]] is a former [[Green Knight]] who was visible through an [[Aethertech capsule]] monitor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Parryl Cryce]] is a former [[Green Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl is a [[Lichborn]] girl.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl has glowing green eyes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator has ensured Parryl will survive long enough to complete a mission.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl is a [[Titan Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl flies a green starfighter.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl died.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl was held in a stasis chamber.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Parryl expressed a wish to be out with Raion.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Parryl is in recovery and was attempting to climb into her [[Titan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Parryl is in the [[Green Titan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Parryl is a character mentioned in relation to taking Sola on a ride.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Parryl is spending time with [[Doctor Cryce]] and Raion.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Besides, with the Heart of Visiria, we can get Parryl back. That’s a second Titan Knight.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Still in recovery, as you should remember! I had to stop her from climbing into her Titan!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
